errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again or contact support.

empty.title: No regions unlocked yet

regions.lockedDescription: Where do you want to send and receive money?

providerRejection.restartDescription: This region needs a document from a supported country. You can verify with a different ID.
providerRejection.unavailableDescription: This region is not available for your account. Contact support for help.

initError.fallbackDescription: Something went wrong. Please try again or contact support.

nonCustodial.title: Non-custodial wallet
nonCustodial.description: Only you control this wallet. We can't recover it if you lose access. Your backup is your responsibility.

step2.title: Find Password Manager
step2.description: Autofill → Google Password Manager → Turn ON sync

noBackupWarning.title: No backup = No recovery
noBackupWarning.description: If you lose your phone without backup enabled, your money is gone forever.

faq.losePhone: What if I lose my phone?
faq.exportKeys: Why can't I export my private key?

losePhoneModal.enabledDescription: Sign into your new phone with your {platform, select, android {Google account} other {Apple ID}}. Download Peanut. Your wallet restores automatically
losePhoneModal.noBackupDescription: Your funds are permanently lost, we can't recover your wallet. This is how self-custody works.

changePhoneModal.step1: Verify backup is working (check step 3 above)
changePhoneModal.step2: {platform, select, android {Know your Google account password} other {Know your Apple ID password}}
changePhoneModal.step3: Keep old phone until new one works
changePhoneModal.androidToAndroidDescription: Sign into Google. Your wallet follows.
changePhoneModal.crossPlatformDescription: Create new wallet on new device. Transfer your funds. Passkeys don't work cross-platform unless you are using a third party password manager such as 1Password.

exportKeysModal.saferIntro: Unlike traditional private keys that can be copied as text, passkeys are cryptographic credentials that can't be:

bullets.noteApp: Saved in an unsafe note app

exportKeysModal.tradeoffDescription: You get better security, but passkeys are locked to your device ecosystem (Apple or Google). That's why cloud backup is critical.
exportKeysModal.futureNote: We're exploring advanced export options for power users in future updates.

publicProfile.allSetDescription: Now send or request money to get started.
publicProfile.inviteOnlyLine2: Go beg your friend for an invite link!
publicProfile.begShareText: Bro… I'm on my knees. Peanut is invite-only and I'm locked outside. Save my life and send me your invite
publicProfile.activityPrivateNote: Activity is only visible for you, it is not public.

deleteAccount.confirmDescription: Deleting your account is permanent. We'll switch it off right away and wipe your data within 30 days. This little guy would really rather you stayed.
deleteAccount.doneDescription: Your account is off and your data will be gone within 30 days. Thanks for cracking open Peanut with us — take care out there!
deleteAccount.error: Could not delete your account. Please try again.

descriptions.notReadable: There's an issue with your device's passkey settings. Please try again.
descriptions.notAllowedAndroid: We couldn't create a passkey. This usually means you're not signed in to a Google account, Google Play Services is out of date, or screen lock isn't set up. Fix one of these and retry — or it may have been cancelled.
descriptions.notAllowed: Passkeys are not enabled on your device. Check your device settings to enable them
descriptions.invalidState: A passkey already exists for this account on your device.

kyc.unlockDescription: Confirm your ID to pay with a QR code. Takes about a minute.

kyc.restartDescription: QR payments need a document from a supported country. You can verify with a different ID.
kyc.blockedDescription: QR payments are not available for your account. Contact support for help.

info.exchangeRateTooltip: Rate shown is current but may vary slightly (~$1-5 ARS) until payment is confirmed.
info.saveVsCardTooltipBrl: Foreign cards pay IOF (~3.5%) plus a typical ~3% issuer FX fee. Peanut routes via PIX at the current market rate.
info.saveVsCardTooltipArs: Foreign cards apply the official rate plus a typical ~3% issuer FX fee. Peanut routes via MercadoPago at the current market rate.

success.earnedHoldToClaim: You earned ${amount}! Hold to claim your reward.

errors.pixMinAmount: This Pix charge is below the {amount} BRL minimum for Pix payments.
errors.pixRecurring: This QR code is for a recurring payment (PIX Automático). Peanut doesn't support recurring PIX payments — please ask for a regular PIX QR code instead.
errors.pixDecode: We could not decode this Pix QR code. Please ask the merchant to generate a new one.
errors.genericDecode: We could not decode this particular QR code. Please ask the Merchant if they can generate a Mercado Pago QR
errors.providerIssues: We are currently experiencing issues with {method} payments. We are working to fix it as soon as possible
errors.initiateUnexpected: Could not initiate payment due to unexpected error. Please contact support
errors.fetchDetails: Could not fetch qr payment details
errors.cardAuthNeeded: One-time card authorization needed. You'll be asked to confirm once.
errors.accountStateChanged: Transaction failed due to account state change. Please try again. If the problem persists, contact support.
errors.sessionExpired: Payment session expired. Please scan the QR code again.
errors.merchantNotSupported: This specific QR code or merchant is not supported. Please try again with a different QR code.
errors.completeFailed: Could not complete payment. Please scan the QR code again. If problem persists contact support
errors.minMantecaAmount: Payment amount must be at least ${amount}
errors.maxQrAmount: QR payment amount exceeds maximum limit of ${amount}
errors.minQrAmount: QR payment amount must be at least ${amount}

claim.alreadyClaimed: This QR code has already been claimed by another user.
claim.notAvailable: This QR code is not available for claiming.
claim.inviteQrDescription: Share anywhere. Points keep coming from the activity of friends & their friends.
claim.holdToClaim: Hold to make it yours forever
claim.claimFailed: Failed to claim QR code. Please try again.

claimSuccess.title: This QR is now yours!
claimSuccess.description: Your sticker is now linked to your profile forever.
claimSuccess.stickerDescription: Stick it on your laptop, water bottle, or anywhere you want people to find you. Anyone who scans will be able to join Peanut with your invite and contribute towards your points forever.
claimSuccess.shareText: Scan my QR code to connect with me on Peanut!

entry.title: Spend anywhere Visa is accepted
entry.description: Use your balance at 150M+ merchants. Online, contactless, yours.

status.pendingBody: Hang tight while we finish setting up your card. This usually takes a few seconds.
status.manualReviewBody: We need to do a manual review of your submission. This usually takes 1-2 days and we'll let you know when it's ready.
status.requiresInfoBody: Our team will help you finish your card application — message support to continue.
status.requiresSupportTitle: Something went wrong on our side
status.requiresSupportBody: We hit a snag while processing your card application. Our team needs to take a look — message support and we'll get you sorted.
status.rejectedTitle: We couldn't issue you a card
status.rejectedBody: You can still use Peanut freely to deposit, withdraw, and pay with crypto.

celebration.headlineOg: OG access. You skipped the line.
celebration.headlineDevconnect: Devconnect crew. You skipped the line.
celebration.sublineBadge: You hold a badge that skips the closed-beta queue. Card's yours.
celebration.sublineNoBadge: Welcome to the closed beta. Card's yours.

cancel.title: Cancel card?
cancel.body: This will permanently cancel your card. It won't work for any transactions. You will have to request a new one if you change your mind.
cancel.canceledBody: If you change your mind later, you can request another card.
cancel.feedbackLabel: Help us improve our product for you
cancel.feedbackPlaceholder: Why did you cancel the card?
cancel.thanksBody: We appreciate your feedback, it helps us improve the experience of our app.

lockModal.lockBody: Card will not work for any transactions until you unlock it.
lockModal.lockSuccessBody: Come back at any time to unlock it.
lockModal.unlockBody: Your card will work again for any transactions.

errors.balanceReturnFailed: Could not return your card balance. Please try again or contact support.
errors.authorizationFailed: Card authorization failed. Please try again or contact support.
errors.walletNotReady: Wallet not ready — please retry in a moment
errors.unexpectedStrategy: Unexpected withdrawal strategy — please contact support

countryConfirm.noCandidatesTitle: We need to check your details
countryConfirm.noCandidatesBody: We couldn't confirm your country of residence from your verification. Our team will sort it out — message support to continue.
countryConfirm.title: Confirm your country of residence
countryConfirm.description: Your verification shows two different countries. Pick the one where you currently live — your card application is processed under its rules.

eligibility.title: Let's see if you qualify
eligibility.description: Press and hold the button. We're looking you up.
eligibility.holdAriaLabel: Press and hold to check eligibility

limits.subtitle: Set your per-transaction spending limit.
limits.noActiveCard: No active card to manage limits for.

pin.noPinBody: You need to set a pin before using your card for in-store purchases.
pin.hiddenNote: Your pin is hidden for security reasons.
pin.successBody: You can now use your card for in-store purchases.
pin.ruleChangeLater: You can change your PIN later

rejection.title: the door's tight tonight.
rejection.onTheList: You're on the list — we'll holler when it's your turn
rejection.joinFailed: Failed to join waitlist. Please try again.

terms.title: Card Terms
terms.cardTermsIssuer: I accept the <terms>{partner} Card Terms</terms>, and the <privacy>Issuer Privacy Policy</privacy>
terms.accuracy: I certify that the information I have provided is accurate and that I will abide by all the rules and requirements related to my {partner} Spend Card.
terms.solicitation: I acknowledge that applying for the {partner} Spend Card does not constitute unauthorized solicitation.
terms.accountOpeningPrivacy: I accept the <link>Account Opening Privacy Notice</link>

unlockHistory.badgeSubtitle: Tap to re-open your share asset
unlockHistory.publicLaunchSubtitle: Open to everyone now. Tap to share.

physical.onListBody: You are #{position} on the list. We'll let you know when cards are ready to be shipped.
physical.onListBodyNoPosition: You are on the list. We'll let you know when cards are ready to be shipped.
physical.comingSoonBody: Join our waiting list and be amongst the first to get it.

yourCard.autoRenewBody: Your card will automatically renew in {days, plural, one {# day} other {# days}}, expiration date will change.
yourCard.payAsCreditBody: When a terminal asks debit or credit, choose credit — your Peanut card runs on the credit network.

page.loadFailed: Failed to load card info. Please try again.
page.setupFailed: Could not complete setup — please try again.
page.verificationSlow: Verification is taking longer than expected. Please try again.

recovery.doneBody: {amount} USDC has been returned to your peanut wallet.
recovery.title: Recover your card collateral
recovery.description: This pulls every USDC currently held in your card collateral contract back to your peanut wallet. Auto-balance is turned off as part of recovery so the rebalancer can't top up between now and the transfer.

fixSignature.intro: This tool repairs a wallet state issue that stops your card from funding itself automatically. It takes up to two quick passkey confirmations.
fixSignature.nonceBricked: Your wallet is blocking new card permissions after an earlier security upgrade. One confirmation clears it.
fixSignature.undeployed: Your wallet needs a one-time on-chain activation before card permissions can work.
fixSignature.allSet: All set! Automatic funding is back on and a funding run has been started — your card balance should update within a few minutes.
fixSignature.oneMoreConfirmation: One more confirmation re-enables automatic card funding with a fresh permission.
fixSignature.noActiveCard: No active card found on this account — please contact support.
fixSignature.regrantFailed: Re-enabling did not complete — please try again or contact support.

addMoney.title: Add Money
addMoney.howWouldYouLikeToAdd: How would you like to add money?
addMoney.howMuchToAdd: How much do you want to add?
addMoney.mustMatchBankTransfer: This must exactly match what you send from your bank
addMoney.amountMustMatchBank: Amount must match what you send from your bank!
addMoney.eurAccountsOnlyDescription: Only EUR accounts with IBAN work for onramps. Your local currency account may not work.

methods.migrateFromOfframpDescription: Move your Offramp balance to Peanut
methods.cryptoDescription: Deposit from a wallet or exchange

networkDrawer.title: Choose Network
networkDrawer.description: Select Network you want to make deposit from:
networkDrawer.supportedTokens: {count, plural, one {# Supported token} other {# Supported tokens}}

supportedNetworksModal.title: Supported Networks
supportedNetworksModal.description: One address for all listed below EVM networks - send from any of them and your funds will be routed correctly.
supportedNetworksModal.warning: Sending to the wrong network or token will result in permanent loss.

howToDeposit.title: How to Deposit
howToDeposit.warning: Sending to the wrong network or token will result in permanent loss.
howToDeposit.warningOfframp: Only send USDC on Arbitrum — other tokens or networks may be lost.

default.step2: Open your wallet or exchange and start a withdrawal
default.step3: Paste the address and select one of the supported networks
default.step4: Confirm and send — funds arrive within a few minutes

offramp.step1: Copy your migration deposit address above
offramp.step2: Open your Offramp account and start a withdrawal or send
offramp.step3: Choose USDC on the Arbitrum network and paste the address
offramp.step4: Confirm and send — your balance arrives within a few minutes

crypto.title: Deposit Crypto
crypto.sendUsdcOnArbitrum: Send USDC on Arbitrum to migrate your balance
crypto.tooltipEvm: {count} EVM networks supported. For exact amounts, deposit USDC on Arbitrum. Other chains/tokens are bridged (±0.1%).
crypto.tooltipSol: Your Solana deposit address. Deposits are bridged to Arbitrum (±0.1% variance).
crypto.tooltipTron: Your Tron deposit address. Deposits are bridged to Arbitrum (±0.1% variance).
crypto.migrationAddressTooltip: Use this address for your Offramp migration. It only accepts USDC on Arbitrum — don't save it as a general wallet address.
crypto.warningDescription: Wrong token or network may cause permanent loss.
crypto.warningDescriptionOfframp: Other tokens or networks may cause permanent loss.
crypto.bridgingFeeNote: A small bridging fee (~0.1%) applies — you'll receive slightly less than you send.
crypto.multipleTransfersNote: Moving more than the max? Send it in multiple transfers.
crypto.addressErrorTitle: We couldn't prepare your deposit address
crypto.addressErrorDescription: Nothing was sent. Please try again — if this keeps happening, contact support.
crypto.marketMovedDescription: The exchange rate changed too much to complete your deposit.
crypto.marketMovedNote: Your money is on its way back to your wallet.
crypto.transferSentBackDescription: We couldn't complete your migration transfer.
crypto.transferSentBackNote: Your money was returned to your Offramp account — start the withdrawal again from there.

offrampGate.title: Which Offramp account is this?
offrampGate.description: Enter the username or email of the Offramp account you're migrating from, so we can match your balance to your new Peanut wallet.
offrampGate.error: Could not save your Offramp account. Please try again.

manteca.sendOnlyOwnAccountTitle: Send only from your own account
manteca.sendOnlyOwnAccountDescription: Deposits from third-party accounts are not supported and funds may be lost.
manteca.providerFeesInfo: Our providers and the blockchain charge a small fee for every transaction. This fee is already accounted for in the amount you see.
manteca.minDepositAmount: Deposit amount must be at least ${amount}

pix.scanWithBankApp: Scan with your bank app, or copy the PIX code.

confirmationModal.mismatchDescription: Your deposit will fail and it will take 2 to 10 days to return to your bank and might incur fees. The reference code is single use.

bankDetails.doubleCheckRecipientName: Recipient: enter the name exactly as shown above

withdraw.noAccountsDescription:
Add your accounts details once

to withdraw in one tap.

confirm.recipientReceivesInfo: The full amount arrives on the destination chain. The cross-chain network fee is paid on top — see below.
confirm.networkFeeInfo: Cross-chain bridge fee (destination gas + Rhino's 0.07%). Paid on top of the amount withdrawn.
confirm.highFeeWarning: Note: the network fee is a large share of this withdrawal. Withdrawing a larger amount or choosing a cheaper network reduces it.

compatibilityModal.title: Is this address compatible?
compatibilityModal.description: Only send to address that support the selected network and token. Incorrect transfers may be lost.

pixKey.title: Send with Pix
pixKey.heading: Enter Pix key

pixKey.info: Send to any Pix key — email, phone, CPF/CNPJ or random key.

bank.eurTitle: We send EUR to your bank
bank.eurDescription: Withdrawals are sent in EUR. Your bank may charge conversion fees or reject the transaction if EUR deposits are not supported.
bank.confirmPending: Your transfer is processing. Funds were sent on-chain successfully — this can take a few minutes to confirm. If you don't see the withdrawal in your activity within 30 minutes, please contact support.

manteca.ownAccountOnly: You can only withdraw to accounts under your name.

bankForm.heading: Enter bank account details

bankForm.streetMin: Street address must be 4 characters or more

errors.countryUnresolved: We couldn't determine this account's country. Please contact support.
errors.setupFailed: Something went wrong setting up your withdrawal. Please contact support.
errors.requestFailed: Failed to create request for withdrawal.
errors.chargeFailed: Failed to create charge for withdrawal or charge ID missing.
errors.prepareFailed: Could not prepare withdrawal. Please try again.
errors.confirmDetailsFailed: Failed to load withdrawal details for confirmation. Please go back and try again.
errors.txNotPrepared: Transaction not prepared. Please try again.

errors.depositAddressFailed: Failed to get deposit address from the backend.
errors.lockRateFailed: Could not lock exchange rate. Please try again.
errors.cardAuthFailed: Card authorization failed. Please try again or contact support.
errors.ownAccountOnly: You can only withdraw to accounts under your name.

transaction.pendingLinkDeviceNote: Use the device where you created it to cancel or re-share this link.

perk.title: Peanut Reward
perk.subtitle: Earn rewards every time your friends use Peanut.

actions.inviteFriends: Invite friends to earn more rewards
actions.cancelDepositFailed: We couldn't cancel this deposit. Please try again or contact support.
actions.cancelWarning: This can't be undone. If you already sent the bank transfer, don't cancel — a cancelled deposit can no longer be matched to your account, and the money will be returned to your bank instead.

toast.linkCancelledRefresh: Link cancelled! Refresh to see updated balance.
toast.cancelLinkFailed: Failed to cancel link. Please try again.

cardRows.autoClosed: Automatically cancelled — the merchant didn't complete it
cardRows.authReversed: Hold released — the merchant cancelled the authorization. Funds are back on your card.
cardRows.authExpired: Hold released — the merchant didn't capture the payment in time. Funds are back on your card.

decline.limitTooLow: Card limit reached — increase your limit

nudge.localRailTitle: Pay like a local next time

nudge.usdAbroadTitle: Pay in local currency next time

bridge.depositMessageInfo: Make sure you enter this exact message as the transfer concept or description. If it's not included, the deposit can't be processed.

rewards.title: Rewards
rewards.pendingCallout: waiting for you. Start spending to claim.
rewards.lifetimeRewards: Lifetime rewards: {amount}. To earn more, invite friends.
rewards.pointsToNextTier: {count, plural, one {# point} other {# points}} to next tier

invites.invalidCodeMessage: The invite code you are trying to use is invalid. Please check the URL and try again.
invites.skipDescription: Someone at Peanut wants you in. Create your wallet and walk straight past the line — no invite code, no queue.
invites.vanityDescription: You earned a Peanut badge. To claim it, sign up or log in.
invites.inviterDescription: Members-only access. Use this invite to open your wallet and start sending and receiving money globally.

invites.emailDescription: Enter your email so we can reach you when you get access.
invites.accountNotLoaded: Account not loaded yet. Please wait a moment and try again.

invites.notificationsDescription: We'll notify you the moment you get access.
invites.skipTheLine: Skip the line — drop the username of the member who invited you.
invites.acceptFailed: Something went wrong. Please try again or contact support.

badges.title: Badges
badges.emptyDescription: Earn badges as you use Peanut. Make payments, invite friends, and join events to unlock them and display them on your profile.
badges.publicProfileNote: These Badges are displayed on your public profile.
badges.toastMultiple: You unlocked {count, plural, one {# badge} other {# badges}} 🎉

notifications.title: Notifications
notifications.loadFailed: Failed to load notifications. Please try again.
notifications.loadMoreFailed: Failed to load more notifications. Tap to retry.
notifications.emptyDescription: You will see your notifications here.
notifications.setupDescription: Enable notifications and get alerts for all wallet activity.

kyc.doesntStoreDocuments: Peanut doesn't store any of your documents
kyc.doesntStoreDocumentsPeriod: Peanut doesn't store any of your documents.
kyc.rejectLabelsFallbackDescription: We need a bit more from you to confirm your ID. Please provide the requested details to continue.
kyc.terminalDescription: Your verification cannot be retried. Please contact support for help.
kyc.failedDescriptionRetry: We weren't able to confirm your ID. You can have another go.
kyc.actionRequiredDescription: We need a bit more from you to confirm your ID.
kyc.processingDescription: We're confirming your ID. This usually takes less than a minute.
kyc.unsupportedRegionError: Bank deposits aren't available in your region yet. We'll let you know as soon as they go live.
kyc.processingStatusValue: We're reviewing your documents. This usually takes 5-10 min.
kyc.errorSdkUnavailable: KYC SDK not available. Please update the app.
kyc.errorInitiateFailed: Could not initiate verification. Please try again.
kyc.errorRestartFailed: Could not restart identity verification. Please try again.
kyc.errorResubmitFailed: Could not initiate document resubmission. Please try again.
kyc.errorNoResponse: No response from server. Please try again.
kyc.errorStartDocVerification: Could not start document verification. Please try again.

initiate.descriptionBlocked: We couldn't confirm your ID. Please contact support for assistance.
initiate.descriptionRestartIdentity: This rail needs a document from a supported country. You can verify with a different ID.
initiate.descriptionProviderRejection: Please upload a clearer photo of your ID to continue.
initiate.descriptionCrossRegion: Your identity is already verified. To turn on payments in {region}, we just need to confirm a few more details — about a minute.
initiate.descriptionCrossRegionGeneric: Your identity is already verified. To turn on payments here, we just need to confirm a few more details — about a minute.
initiate.descriptionRegionUnavailable: Due to UK regulations, bank transfers aren't available for UK residents. Your funds are safe — you can withdraw them as crypto anytime.
initiate.descriptionDefault: Confirm your ID to unlock payments. Takes about a minute.

advisory.title: One quick step to continue
advisory.descriptionByDate: To continue using bank transfers, please complete a short verification (required by {deadline}). It only takes a couple of minutes.
advisory.description: To continue using bank transfers, please complete a short verification. It only takes a couple of minutes.

progress.verifyingDescription: We're confirming your ID — usually less than a minute. You can wait here, or head home and we'll let you know when it's done.
progress.preparingTimedOutDescription: You can continue and we'll notify you when it's ready.
progress.preparingSlowDescription: This is taking a bit longer than usual. Hang tight.
progress.bridgeTosDescription: Last step: accept terms of service to unlock bank transfers in the US, Europe, and Mexico.
progress.completeDescription: Your account is ready to go.

wrapper.troubleDescription: If the ID check isn't loading or working properly, our support team will help.
wrapper.exitForNowDescription: You can pick up where you left off later — your progress is saved.
wrapper.loadError: Failed to load verification. Please check your connection and try again.

provideEmail.title: Add your email to continue
provideEmail.description: We couldn't finish setting up your account because we're missing an email address. Add one and we'll retry automatically.
provideEmail.invalidEmail: Please enter a valid email address.
provideEmail.stillLoading: Still loading your account — please try again in a moment.
provideEmail.saveFailed: Something went wrong saving your email. Please try again.

bridgeTos.baseDescription: To enable bank transfers, you need to accept our payment partner's Terms of Service.
bridgeTos.sepaDescription: To enable EUR (SEPA) and GBP (Faster Payments) bank transfers, you need to accept our payment partner's updated Terms of Service.
bridgeTos.loadFailed: Could not load terms. You can accept them later from your activity feed.
bridgeTos.genericError: Something went wrong. You can accept terms later from your activity feed.
bridgeTos.confirmError: Something went wrong confirming your terms. Please try again.

reverificationPending.title: We're reviewing your details
reverificationPending.description: Your verification is being reviewed — this usually takes a few minutes. We'll let you know as soon as you're ready to continue. You can wait here or head home.

PROBLEMATIC_APPLICANT_DATA.title: Data mismatch
PROBLEMATIC_APPLICANT_DATA.description: Your provided information does not match our records. Please check your name, date of birth, and other details.

WRONG_ADDRESS.title: Address mismatch
WRONG_ADDRESS.description: The address you provided does not match your documents. Please correct it and try again.

DB_DATA_MISMATCH.title: Data inconsistency
DB_DATA_MISMATCH.description: Your information does not match the government database. Please verify your details are correct.

DB_DATA_NOT_FOUND.title: Data not found
DB_DATA_NOT_FOUND.description: Your data could not be found in the government database. Please double-check your details.

REQUESTED_DATA_MISMATCH.title: Document details mismatch
REQUESTED_DATA_MISMATCH.description: The document details do not match the information you provided.

GPS_AS_POA_SKIPPED.title: Address details incomplete
GPS_AS_POA_SKIPPED.description: Insufficient address details were provided. Please provide your full address.

DOCUMENT_BAD_QUALITY.title: Low quality document
DOCUMENT_BAD_QUALITY.description: The document image was blurry, dark, or hard to read. Please upload a clearer photo.

LOW_QUALITY.title: Low quality document
LOW_QUALITY.description: The document quality is too low to process. Please upload a clearer image.

UNSATISFACTORY_PHOTOS.title: Unreadable photo
UNSATISFACTORY_PHOTOS.description: The photo is not readable. Please upload a clearer image.

DOCUMENT_DAMAGED.title: Damaged document
DOCUMENT_DAMAGED.description: The document appears damaged or worn. Please use a document in good condition.

DOCUMENT_INCOMPLETE.title: Incomplete document
DOCUMENT_INCOMPLETE.description: Part of the document was cut off or missing. Make sure the full document is visible.

INCOMPLETE_DOCUMENT.title: Incomplete document
INCOMPLETE_DOCUMENT.description: Some pages or sides of the document are missing. Please upload the complete document.

DOCUMENT_PAGE_MISSING.title: Missing page
DOCUMENT_PAGE_MISSING.description: A required page of the document is missing. Please upload all pages.

DOCUMENT_MISSING.title: Missing document
DOCUMENT_MISSING.description: A required document was not provided. Please upload all requested documents.

BLACK_AND_WHITE.title: Color document required
BLACK_AND_WHITE.description: The document was provided in black and white. Please upload a color image.

SCREENSHOTS.title: Screenshots not accepted
SCREENSHOTS.description: Screenshots are not accepted. Please upload a direct photo of the document.

DIGITAL_DOCUMENT.title: Original document required
DIGITAL_DOCUMENT.description: A digital version was uploaded. Please upload a photo of the original document.

DOCUMENT_EXPIRED.title: Expired document
DOCUMENT_EXPIRED.description: The document has expired. Please use a valid, non-expired document.

EXPIRATION_DATE.title: Expiration date issue
EXPIRATION_DATE.description: The document is expired or expiring soon. Please use a document with a valid expiration date.

ID_INVALID.title: Invalid ID
ID_INVALID.description: The identity document is not valid. Please use a different document.

UNSUPPORTED_DOCUMENT.title: Unsupported document type
UNSUPPORTED_DOCUMENT.description: This type of document is not accepted. Please use a passport, national ID, or driver's license.

WRONG_DOCUMENT.title: Wrong document provided
WRONG_DOCUMENT.description: The uploaded document does not match what was requested. Please upload the correct document.

NOT_DOCUMENT.title: Not a valid document
NOT_DOCUMENT.description: The uploaded file is not a document. Please upload the correct file.

DOCUMENT_TEMPLATE.title: Template document
DOCUMENT_TEMPLATE.description: The provided document appears to be a template. Please upload your actual document.

OUTDATED_DOCUMENT_VERSION.title: Outdated document
OUTDATED_DOCUMENT_VERSION.description: This is not the most recent version of the document. Please provide the latest version.

UNFILLED_ID.title: Unreadable document
UNFILLED_ID.description: The document could not be read. Please upload a clearer image.

UNSUITABLE_DOCUMENT.title: Unsuitable document
UNSUITABLE_DOCUMENT.description: The document does not meet the requirements. Please check the requirements and try again.

INCOMPATIBLE_LANGUAGE.title: Unsupported language
INCOMPATIBLE_LANGUAGE.description: The document is in an unsupported language. Please provide a translated or alternative document.

UNSUPPORTED_LANGUAGE.title: Unsupported language
UNSUPPORTED_LANGUAGE.description: The document is in an unsupported language.

BAD_PROOF_OF_IDENTITY.title: Identity document issue
BAD_PROOF_OF_IDENTITY.description: There was an issue with your identity document. Please upload a valid, clear copy.

BAD_PROOF_OF_ADDRESS.title: Proof of address issue
BAD_PROOF_OF_ADDRESS.description: There was an issue with your proof of address. Please upload a valid document with your full name and address.

BAD_PROOF_OF_PAYMENT.title: Payment proof issue
BAD_PROOF_OF_PAYMENT.description: There was an issue verifying your payment information.

ADDITIONAL_DOCUMENT_REQUIRED.title: Additional document needed
ADDITIONAL_DOCUMENT_REQUIRED.description: An additional document is required. Please check the request and upload the needed document.

SELFIE_MISMATCH.title: Selfie does not match
SELFIE_MISMATCH.description: The selfie did not match the photo on your document. Please try again with a clear selfie.

BAD_FACE_MATCHING.title: Face not clearly visible
BAD_FACE_MATCHING.description: Your face was not clearly visible. Please take a well-lit selfie showing your full face.

BAD_SELFIE.title: Selfie issue
BAD_SELFIE.description: There was an issue with your selfie. Please take a clear, well-lit selfie.

BAD_VIDEO_SELFIE.title: Video selfie issue
BAD_VIDEO_SELFIE.description: The video selfie check could not be completed. Please try again.

SELFIE_BAD_QUALITY.title: Low quality selfie
SELFIE_BAD_QUALITY.description: The selfie was blurry or poorly lit. Please take a clear, well-lit selfie.

SELFIE_SPOOFING.title: Selfie issue detected
SELFIE_SPOOFING.description: A live selfie is required. Do not use a photo of a photo or a screen.

FRAUDULENT_LIVENESS.title: Liveness check failed
FRAUDULENT_LIVENESS.description: The liveness check could not be completed. Please try again with a live selfie.

DOCUMENT_FAKE.title: Document could not be verified
DOCUMENT_FAKE.description: We were unable to verify the authenticity of your document.

FORGERY.title: Document could not be verified
FORGERY.description: The document could not be verified. Please use an original, unaltered document.

GRAPHIC_EDITOR.title: Edited document detected
GRAPHIC_EDITOR.description: The document appears to have been digitally altered.

GRAPHIC_EDITOR_USAGE.title: Edited document detected
GRAPHIC_EDITOR_USAGE.description: The document appears to have been digitally altered.

FRAUDULENT_PATTERNS.title: Verification failed
FRAUDULENT_PATTERNS.description: Your verification could not be completed due to a security concern.

THIRD_PARTY_INVOLVED.title: Third party detected
THIRD_PARTY_INVOLVED.description: A third party was detected during verification. You must complete verification yourself.

BLOCKLIST.title: Account restricted
BLOCKLIST.description: Your account has been restricted. Please contact support.

SPAM.title: Too many attempts
SPAM.description: Too many files were uploaded. Please contact support.

AGE_REQUIREMENT_MISMATCH.title: Age requirement not met
AGE_REQUIREMENT_MISMATCH.description: You must meet the minimum age requirement to use this service.

AGE_BELOW_ACCEPTED_LIMIT.title: Age requirement not met
AGE_BELOW_ACCEPTED_LIMIT.description: You must be at least 18 years old to use this service.

REGULATIONS_VIOLATIONS.title: Regulatory restriction
REGULATIONS_VIOLATIONS.description: Verification could not be completed due to regulatory requirements.

WRONG_USER_REGION.title: Unsupported region
WRONG_USER_REGION.description: Your country or region is not currently supported.

DUPLICATE.title: Duplicate account
DUPLICATE.description: An account with your details already exists.

RESTRICTED_PERSON.title: Verification restricted
RESTRICTED_PERSON.description: Your verification could not be completed. Please contact support.

ADVERSE_MEDIA.title: Verification failed
ADVERSE_MEDIA.description: Your verification could not be completed. Please contact support.

CRIMINAL.title: Verification failed
CRIMINAL.description: Your verification could not be completed. Please contact support.

COMPROMISED_PERSONS.title: Verification failed
COMPROMISED_PERSONS.description: Your verification could not be completed. Please contact support.

PEP.title: Verification failed
PEP.description: Your verification could not be completed due to compliance requirements.

SANCTIONS.title: Verification failed
SANCTIONS.description: Your verification could not be completed due to compliance requirements.

INCONSISTENT_PROFILE.title: Inconsistent documents
INCONSISTENT_PROFILE.description: The documents provided appear to belong to different individuals.

CHECK_UNAVAILABLE.title: Verification temporarily unavailable
CHECK_UNAVAILABLE.description: The verification database is currently unavailable. Please try again later.

DUPLICATE_EMAIL.title: Email already in use
DUPLICATE_EMAIL.description: This email is already linked to another Peanut account. If it's yours, sign in to that account to continue — otherwise contact support.

FALLBACK.title: Verification issue
FALLBACK.description: There was an issue with your verification. Please try again or contact support.

inviteFriendsModal.title: Invite friends!
inviteFriendsModal.description: Share your link. Every time a friend you brought makes a payment, you earn rewards.

confirmInviteModal.title: Don't lose your invite!
confirmInviteModal.description: This link lets you skip the Peanut waitlist. Using {method} will skip your invite.

earlyUserModal.title: Earn from invites
earlyUserModal.inviteOnly: Peanut is now invite-only and you're in!
earlyUserModal.earnRules: Friends you invite → you earn a cut of their fees. Their invites → you earn a cut of their cut.

noMoreJailModal.title: No more Peanut jail!
noMoreJailModal.line2: Explore, pay, and invite your friends.

AQ.caption: 🐧 No banks here, only penguins!
AQ.subtitle: Antarctica isn't a real country... yet

BV.caption: 🧊 Population: 0. Banks: also 0.
BV.subtitle: An uninhabited Norwegian glacier in the South Atlantic

CX.caption: 🦀 Red crabs don't need bank accounts
CX.subtitle: 45 million crabs, zero ATMs

CC.caption: 🥥 Coconuts accepted, wire transfers not so much
CC.subtitle: Population: 544. Financial infrastructure: vibes

GS.caption: 🐧 More penguins than people
GS.subtitle: South Georgia: 30 researchers, 3 million penguins, 0 banks

HM.caption: 🌋 Active volcano, inactive banking sector
HM.subtitle: Heard Island: uninhabited, unless you count the seals

PN.caption: 🏴‍☠️ 47 people. 0 ATMs. All vibes.
PN.subtitle: The world's least populated jurisdiction with a .pn domain

TK.caption: 🌊 No roads, no banks, no problem

cancelSendLinkModal.title: Cancel this link?
cancelSendLinkModal.amountReturned: The {amount} locked in the link will go straight back to your balance.
cancelSendLinkModal.noLongerClaimable: Once cancelled, nobody will be able to claim it.

balanceWarningModal.title: High Balance
balanceWarningModal.congrats: You're rich! Congrats on having a high balance.
balanceWarningModal.selfCustody: With Peanut, you're the only one who can access your funds. No bank, no company, no agency — not even our support team — can ever access them.
balanceWarningModal.passkey: Your biometric passkey is your key to full control and security. If it's lost, it can't be recovered because only you ever have access.
balanceWarningModal.learnMore: Learn how to keep your passkey secure on <link>{platform}</link>.

guestLoginModal.title: Sign in with your Peanut Wallet
guestLoginModal.noWallet: Don't have a Peanut wallet? Get one now.

iosPwaInstallModal.title: Add Peanut to your Home Screen
iosPwaInstallModal.description: Follow a quick guide to add the app to your home screen, no download needed.
iosPwaInstallModal.firefoxDescription: Firefox on iOS does not support installing apps to the home screen. Please open this page in Safari to continue.
iosPwaInstallModal.videoUnsupported: Your browser does not support the video tag.

unsupportedBrowserModal.title: Open this link in your browser
unsupportedBrowserModal.description: We're still working on making Peanut work on your browser. For now, please use Chrome or Safari.
unsupportedBrowserModal.pasteHint: Then paste it in your preferred browser.

tokenAndNetworkConfirmationModal.title: Send only supported tokens on supported networks
tokenAndNetworkConfirmationModal.warning: Sending the wrong token or using the wrong network will result in permanent loss.

rainCooldownIntroModal.title: Please wait
rainCooldownIntroModal.description: Your card needs a short cool-down between back-to-back spends. To avoid this in the future, you can lower your card limit to be below your wallet balance; the extra will always be available.

staleCardApprovalModal.title: Re-enable your card
staleCardApprovalModal.description: Your card needs to be re-enabled before you can withdraw. It only takes one passkey tap.
staleCardApprovalModal.successDescription: Your card is ready — please try your withdrawal again.
staleCardApprovalModal.cancelledError: Re-enabling was cancelled. Tap Re-enable card to try again.
staleCardApprovalModal.unexpectedError: We couldn't re-enable your card. Please try again.

errors.tokenPriceFetch: Something went wrong while fetching the token price. Please change the input denomination and try again.
errors.tokenChainUndefined: Please ensure that the correct token and chain are defined.
errors.insufficientTokenBalance: Please ensure that you have sufficient balance of the token you are trying to send, including gas fees.
errors.minimumSendAmount: The minimum amount to send is 0.0001.
errors.gaslessDepositPayloadError: Error making the gasless deposit payload.
errors.signDataError: Error signing the data in the wallet.
errors.gaslessDepositApiError: Error making the gasless deposit through the peanut api.
errors.transferAmountExceedsBalance: You do not have enough balance to complete the transaction.
errors.chainMismatch: Failed to switch network. Try switching to the correct network manually.
errors.passkeyNotCompleted: Your device didn't complete the passkey confirmation. Try again — if it keeps failing, unlock your password manager (e.g. 1Password) or restart your device.
errors.claimLinkFailed: Could not claim link, please refresh page. If problem persist confirm link with sender
errors.lowLiquidity: Low liquidity. Please try a smaller amount or different route.
errors.networkBusyTimeout: The network is busy and your request timed out. Please try again in a moment.
errors.genericSupport: There was an issue with your request. Please contact support.

appLock.title: Welcome back!
appLock.prompt: Please log in to access the app.
appLock.promptFailed: Please log in again to access the app.
